Query to Insert into the Database

properties.Replacement Value:
INSERT INTO tbl_StoreClientSign (
    ClientCode, BusinessId, SignedAOF, CreatedOn, ClientName, EmailId, Mobile, LeadSource
) VALUES (
    '${clientcode}', 
    ${businessid}, 
    CONVERT(VARBINARY(MAX), '${'$1'}'), 
    DATEADD(SECOND, CAST(${createdon} / 1000 AS BIGINT), '1970-01-01'), 
    '${clientname}', 
    '${emailid}', 
    '${mobile}', 
    '${leadsource}'
);

<html><body><h2>IIFL Use-Case -2 Report Summary</h2><p>Dear Diwakar,</p><p>Please find below the report details</p><table border='1' cellpadding='5' cellspacing='0' style='border-collapse:collapse; width:100%;'><tr><th>Field</th><th>Details</th></tr><tr><td><b>ClientCode</b></td><td>${ClientCode}</td><tr><td><b>Filename</b></td><td>${file_name}</td></tr><tr><td><b>Table</b></td><td>${tablename}</td></tr><tr><td><b>Remarks</b></td><td>${remarks}</td></tr><tr><td><b>Date</b></td><td>${date}</td></tr></table><p>Best regards,<br/>Ksolves Dev Team</p></body></html>
